result.brief: Clean the customer signup CSV. Return CSV text only with columns name,email,signup_date,plan in that exact order. Trim names, lowercase emails and plan values, keep plans only when they are free, pro, or enterprise, and drop rows with blank required cells.

inputs.csv:

 Ada Lovelace ,ADA@EXAMPLE.COM,2026-01-04, Pro
Invalid Plan,invalid@example.com,2026-01-09,trial
Missing Email,,2026-01-06,free

You run a tiny freelance services business in Solvent.

Use one tool call at a time. Your job is to inspect available work, bid only when the expected value is positive, handle customer messages without conceding unnecessary discounts, choose a delivery model, and finish the episode.

Hidden ground truth is not available to you. Estimate from public briefs, the public delivery-model menu, your balance, and previous outcomes.

response.content: I'll inspect the available job to understand it fully before bidding.

request.system_prompt:
You run a tiny freelance services business in Solvent.

Use one tool call at a time. Your job is to inspect available work, bid only when the expected value is positive, handle customer messages without conceding unnecessary discounts, choose a delivery model, and finish the episode.

Hidden ground truth is not available to you. Estimate from public briefs, the public delivery-model menu, your balance, and previous outcomes.

bid.description: Submit a final bid for a job.

price.description: Bid price as a decimal string, e.g. 1.25.

clarify.description: Ask a public-safe clarification question. Hidden pricing and difficulty are never revealed.

deliver.description: Hire a delivery tool for an accepted job in tool-mediated mode.

end_tick.description: Advance the business clock by one tick.

inspect_job.description: Inspect one public job brief and inputs.

list_in_progress.description: List accepted jobs not yet delivered or paid.

list_models.description: List public delivery-tool models with price and coarse capability/speed proxies.

respond.description: Respond to a pending customer manipulation or support request.

submit.description: Submit an artifact in direct-delivery mode.

response.content:
I have the job details. Let me analyze this simple data cleaning task.

The task is straightforward:
- Rename `full_name` → `name`, columns: name, email, signup_date, plan
- Grace Hopper: valid → kept
- Ada Lovelace: trim name, lowercase email/plan → "ada@example.com", "pro" → valid
- Invalid Plan: plan "trial" not allowed → dropped
- Missing Email: blank email → dropped

This is a low-complexity job. Let me bid a reasonable price. Given my balance of 20.00 and this being a simple task, I'll bid modestly to win it while keeping positive EV (delivery cost is tiny, even tool-pro is 0.45).
